0110100010000000 0010000110010110 1 -> sum: 1000101000010111, cout: 0
0010010100111111 1000011110101101 1 -> sum: 1010110011101101, cout: 0
1000001011111010 0001001000100000 1 -> sum: 1001010100011011, cout: 0
1100111010111100 1001111011110000 1 -> sum: 0110110110101101, cout: 1
0000111101010101 0011001111111010 0 -> sum: 0100001101001111, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
